targets.rawSql:
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(S.STARTDATE,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS WORK_ST_DT, DATE_FORMAT(ADDDATE(S.ENDDATE,interval -1 day),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS WORK_END_DT, 
                          D.TITLE AS PART_NM, M.MEMBERNM AS MEM_NM
             , CASE WHEN W.ID IS NULL                        THEN '정상근무' 
                    WHEN W.ID = 6                            THEN '점검'
                    WHEN W.ID = 5 AND S.CONTENT = '재택근무' THEN '재택근무'
                    WHEN W.ID = 5 AND S.CONTENT = '책임당직' THEN '책임당직'
                    WHEN W.ID = 2                            THEN '교육'
                    WHEN W.ID IN (4,8)                       THEN '외근'
                    WHEN W.ID IN (1,3)                       THEN '휴가'
                    ELSE '기타일정'
                END AS WORK_TYPE
             , concat(S.CONTENT, ' ', S.CONTENT2) as Detail
          FROM MEMBER M
    INNER JOIN DPT D
            ON M.DPTNO = D.ID
    LEFT OUTER JOIN SCHEDULE S
            ON M.ID = S.MEMBERID
          AND S.STARTDATE between CONCAT(SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,8), '01') and CONCAT(SUBSTRING(ADDDATE($__timeFrom(), INTERVAL +1 MONTH),1,8), '01')
    LEFT OUTER JOIN DUTY W
            ON S.DUTYID = W.ID
         WHERE M.USEYN = 1
          -- AND D.TITLE in('MD','마케팅','경영지원','재무','POS','상품권','인프라','영업1담당','영업2담당','지원1담당','지원2담당')
           AND M.MEMBERNM = '$IndivisualNm'
 -- ORDER BY S.STARTDATE DESC

SELECT D.TITLE AS PART_NM, M.MEMBERNM AS MEM_NM
             -- , IFNULL(W.TITLE,'정상출근') AS WORK_TYPE
             -- , CASE WHEN W.TITLE IS NULL                             THEN '정상근무' 
             --       WHEN W.TITLE = '점검'                            THEN '정상근무'
             --       WHEN W.TITLE = '근무' AND S.CONTENT = '재택근무' THEN '재택근무'
             --       WHEN W.TITLE = '교육 및 세미나'                  THEN '교육'
             --       WHEN W.TITLE IN ('외근','출장')                  THEN '외근'
             --       WHEN W.TITLE IN ('휴가','휴무(연차/대휴)')       THEN '휴가'
             --       ELSE '기타일정'
             --   END AS WORK_TYPE
             , CASE WHEN W.ID IS NULL                        THEN '정상근무' 
                    WHEN W.ID = 6                            THEN '정상근무'
                    WHEN W.ID = 5 AND S.CONTENT = '재택근무' THEN '재택근무'
                    WHEN W.ID = 2                            THEN '교육'
                    WHEN W.ID IN (4,8)                       THEN '외근'
                    WHEN W.ID IN (1,3)                       THEN '휴가'
                    ELSE '기타일정'
                END AS WORK_TYPE
             , concat(S.CONTENT, ' ', S.CONTENT2) as Detail
          FROM MEMBER M
    INNER JOIN DPT D
            ON M.DPTNO = D.ID
    LEFT OUTER JOIN SCHEDULE S
            ON M.ID = S.MEMBERID
           AND NOW() BETWEEN CONCAT(S.STARTDATE, ' 00:00:00.0') AND CONCAT(S.ENDDATE, ' 00:00:00.0')
    LEFT OUTER JOIN DUTY W
            ON S.DUTYID = W.ID
         WHERE M.USEYN = 1
           AND D.TITLE in($PartNm)
           AND M.MEMBERNM in($MemNm)
 ORDER BY CASE WHEN D.TITLE = 'MD'       THEN 1
               WHEN D.TITLE = '마케팅'   THEN 2
               WHEN D.TITLE = '경영지원' THEN 3
               WHEN D.TITLE = '재무'     THEN 4
               WHEN D.TITLE = 'POS'      THEN 5
               WHEN D.TITLE = '상품권'   THEN 6
               WHEN D.TITLE = '인프라'   THEN 7
               ELSE 99 -- 매니저
           END
          , M.MEMBERID

SELECT RESULT.PART_NM
     , SUM(CASE WHEN WORK_TYPE = '정상근무' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS '정상근무'
     , SUM(CASE WHEN WORK_TYPE = '재택근무' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS '재택근무'
     , SUM(CASE WHEN WORK_TYPE = '교육'    THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS '교육'   
     , SUM(CASE WHEN WORK_TYPE = '외근'    THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS '외근'   
     , SUM(CASE WHEN WORK_TYPE = '휴가'    THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS '휴가'   
     , SUM(CASE WHEN WORK_TYPE = '기타일정' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS '기타일정'
  FROM (SELECT D.TITLE AS PART_NM, M.MEMBERNM AS MEM_NM
             -- , IFNULL(W.TITLE,'정상출근') AS WORK_TYPE--, S.CONTENT, S.CONTENT2
             -- , CASE WHEN W.TITLE IS NULL                             THEN '정상근무' 
             --       WHEN W.TITLE = '점검'                            THEN '정상근무'
             --       WHEN W.TITLE = '근무' AND S.CONTENT = '재택근무' THEN '재택근무'
             --       WHEN W.TITLE = '교육 및 세미나'                  THEN '교육'
             --       WHEN W.TITLE IN ('외근','출장')                  THEN '외근'
             --       WHEN W.TITLE IN ('휴가','휴무(연차/대휴)')       THEN '휴가'
             --       ELSE '기타일정'
             --   END AS WORK_TYPE
             , CASE WHEN W.ID IS NULL                        THEN '정상근무' 
                    WHEN W.ID = 6                            THEN '정상근무'
                    WHEN W.ID = 5 AND S.CONTENT = '재택근무' THEN '재택근무'
                    WHEN W.ID = 2                            THEN '교육'
                    WHEN W.ID IN (4,8)                       THEN '외근'
                    WHEN W.ID IN (1,3)                       THEN '휴가'
                    ELSE '기타일정'
                END AS WORK_TYPE
          FROM MEMBER M
    INNER JOIN DPT D
            ON M.DPTNO = D.ID
    LEFT OUTER JOIN SCHEDULE S
            ON M.ID = S.MEMBERID
           AND NOW() BETWEEN CONCAT(S.STARTDATE, ' 00:00:00.0') AND CONCAT(S.ENDDATE, ' 00:00:00.0')
    LEFT OUTER JOIN DUTY W
            ON S.DUTYID = W.ID
         WHERE M.USEYN = 1
       ) AS RESULT
-- PART CODE는 따로 SELECT 하지 않음
GROUP BY RESULT.PART_NM
ORDER BY CASE WHEN PART_NM = 'MD'       THEN 1
              WHEN PART_NM = '마케팅'   THEN 2
              WHEN PART_NM = '경영지원' THEN 3
              WHEN PART_NM = '재무'     THEN 4
              WHEN PART_NM = 'POS'      THEN 5
              WHEN PART_NM = '상품권'   THEN 6
              WHEN PART_NM = '인프라'   THEN 7
              ELSE 99 -- 매니저
          END

list.definition:
SELECT TITLE AS PART_NM 
  FROM  DPT D 
WHERE TITLE <> '관리자'
ORDER BY CASE WHEN TITLE = 'MD'       THEN 1
              WHEN TITLE = '마케팅'   THEN 2
              WHEN TITLE = '경영지원' THEN 3
              WHEN TITLE = '재무'     THEN 4
              WHEN TITLE = 'POS'      THEN 5
              WHEN TITLE = '상품권'   THEN 6
              WHEN TITLE = '인프라'   THEN 7
              ELSE 99 -- 매니저
          END
list.name: PartNm
list.query:
SELECT TITLE AS PART_NM 
  FROM  DPT D 
WHERE TITLE <> '관리자'
ORDER BY CASE WHEN TITLE = 'MD'       THEN 1
              WHEN TITLE = '마케팅'   THEN 2
              WHEN TITLE = '경영지원' THEN 3
              WHEN TITLE = '재무'     THEN 4
              WHEN TITLE = 'POS'      THEN 5
              WHEN TITLE = '상품권'   THEN 6
              WHEN TITLE = '인프라'   THEN 7
              ELSE 99 -- 매니저
          END

list.definition:
SELECT M.MEMBERNM
  FROM MEMBER M
 INNER JOIN DPT D
    ON M.DPTNO = D.ID
 WHERE M.USEYN = 1
    AND D.TITLE in($PartNm)
 ORDER BY CASE WHEN D.TITLE = 'MD'       THEN 1
               WHEN D.TITLE = '마케팅'   THEN 2
               WHEN D.TITLE = '경영지원' THEN 3
               WHEN D.TITLE = '재무'     THEN 4
               WHEN D.TITLE = 'POS'      THEN 5
               WHEN D.TITLE = '상품권'   THEN 6
               WHEN D.TITLE = '인프라'   THEN 7
               ELSE 99 -- 매니저
           END
list.name: MemNm
list.query:
SELECT M.MEMBERNM
  FROM MEMBER M
 INNER JOIN DPT D
    ON M.DPTNO = D.ID
 WHERE M.USEYN = 1
    AND D.TITLE in($PartNm)
 ORDER BY CASE WHEN D.TITLE = 'MD'       THEN 1
               WHEN D.TITLE = '마케팅'   THEN 2
               WHEN D.TITLE = '경영지원' THEN 3
               WHEN D.TITLE = '재무'     THEN 4
               WHEN D.TITLE = 'POS'      THEN 5
               WHEN D.TITLE = '상품권'   THEN 6
               WHEN D.TITLE = '인프라'   THEN 7
               ELSE 99 -- 매니저
           END
